name: libretrakt
description: Live, subscribable iCalendar feeds for TV shows using TMDb and Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.dev: pnpm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name libretrakt --branch main
scripts.pages:create: wrangler pages project create libretrakt --production-branch main
scripts.secret:tmdb: wrangler pages secret put TMDB_API_TOKEN --project-name libretrakt
